security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://discord.com https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co

bundle.shortDescription: Music project organizer for producers and engineers
bundle.longDescription: TrackFlow automatically finds your FL Studio, Ableton, and Pro Tools projects and lets you organize them your way.
